title: Hooks Graph
description: React data hooks for **Hooks Graph**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.
context: React data hooks for **Hooks Graph**: loading state, error propagation, and polling rules for `SpecdDataPort`. Hooks keep components free of transport details and `@specd/core` imports.

rules.requirement: graph hooks expose port-graph operations to views
rules: Consumers MUST receive graph status, search, impact, spec coverage, and linkage data exclusively via `client:port-graph`.

rules.requirement: stale graph index shows warning affordances
rules: When `getGraphStatus` reports a stale index, hooks MUST expose a boolean consumed by `ui:sidebar-graph-entry` and graph tabs.

scenarios.requirement: graph hooks expose port-graph operations to views
scenarios.name: Graph status hook calls port-graph

scenarios.requirement: graph hooks expose port-graph operations to views
scenarios.name: Search hook delegates to port
when: user runs symbol search in graph view

scenarios.requirement: graph hooks expose port-graph operations to views
scenarios.name: Index action uses mutate path

scenarios.requirement: graph hooks expose port-graph operations to views
scenarios.name: Spec tabs use graph hooks for coverage and impact
when: user opens spec Coverage or Impact
then: the hooks call getSpecGraphView and getImpact({ spec }) through client:port-graph
AND the view does not import graph or core logic directly

scenarios.requirement: stale graph index shows warning affordances
scenarios.name: Stale flag shows warning badge
